title: CR. WJC/144/2025 - Maharana Pratap  Vs The State of Bihar through Principal Secretary, Home Department, Bihar
text:
IN THE HIGH COURT OF JUDICATURE AT PATNA
Criminal Writ Jurisdiction Case No.144 of 2025
Arising Out of PS. Case No.- Year-0 Thana- District- Siwan
======================================================
Maharana Pratap Son of Jitendra Ray Resident of Village - Jagdishpur, P.S. -
Jamo Bazar, P.S. - Madhopur, Disrtict - Siwan, Bihar
... ... Petitioner/s
Versus
1. The State of Bihar through Principal Secretary, Home Department, Bihar
Bihar
2. The Director General of Police, Bihar Patna Bihar
3. The Superintendent of Police, Siwan Bihar
4. The Officer-in-Charge, Jamo Bazar Police Station, District - Saran Bihar
... ... Respondent/s
======================================================
Appearance :
For the Petitioner/s : Ms. Swarna Roy, Advocate
For the Respondent/s : Mr.Vijaya Laxmi Shrivastava, Ac to S.C.23
======================================================
CORAM: HONOURABLE MR. JUSTICE SANDEEP KUMAR
ORAL ORDER
3 07-08-2025 Heard the learned counsel for the petitioner and the
learned counsel for the State.
2. The learned counsel for the petitioner seeks
permission to withdraw this application.
3. Permission is accorded.
4. Accordingly, this application is dismissed as
withdrawn.
(Sandeep Kumar, J)
Shishir/-
U T
parties: Maharana Pratap  Vs The State of Bihar through Principal Secretary, Home Department, Bihar
